_sources.source_name: CMS National Correct Coding Initiative (NCCI) Practitioner PTP Edit Files

explanation: NCCI PTP edit: 97140 and 97530 are bundled per CMS PTP edits. Bypassing requires distinct, non-overlapping body regions or separate session encounters using Modifier 59.
NCCI PTP edit: 97140 is bundled into 97110. Bypassing requires application to separate, distinct anatomical sites or documentation of entirely independent purposes.
NCCI PTP edit: 97112 and 97110 have mutual billing limits on matching segments unless distinct operational intents or regions are proven.
NCCI PTP edit: Massage therapy 97124 is an integral component of manual therapy 97140. Separate entry is only allowed if executed on completely unique segments.
NCCI PTP edit: Gait training mechanics are bundled with dynamic therapeutic activities unless distinct intervals or independent clinical tasks are demonstrated.
NCCI PTP edit: 97110 and 97530 are bundled per CMS PTP edits. Separate execution requires completely unique structural goals or body regions.
NCCI PTP edit: Neuromuscular reeducation and therapeutic activity are mutually exclusive unless performed at non-overlapping timestamps or structural locations.
NCCI PTP edit: Gait training limits therapeutic exercise entries unless separate sessions or entirely discrete muscular systems are isolated.
NCCI PTP edit: Gait parameters are bundled into neuromuscular reeducation unless separate segments or specific developmental contexts apply.
NCCI PTP edit: Self-care ADL training includes therapeutic exercise unless isolated structural purposes and distinct times are justified via Modifier 59.

NCCI PTP edit: ADL performance training limits concurrent overground gait training claims unless separate operational boundaries are tracked.
NCCI PTP edit: Manual therapy and self-care cannot be billed inside identical windows or areas without modifier verification of independent clinical tasks.
NCCI PTP edit: Self-care training and dynamic therapeutic activities are comprehensive conflict pairs requiring independent execution timelines.
